name: GitHub REST API
description: GitHub provides a comprehensive REST API for managing repositories, issues, pull requests, actions workflows, organizations, users, gists, releases, and more. Use this API to automate development workflows, manage code repositories, track issues, review pull requests, trigger CI/CD pipelines, and integrate with the GitHub ecosystem.

capabilities.name: repos_list
capabilities.description: List repositories for the authenticated user, or for a specified user or organization.

capabilities.name: repos_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific repository.

capabilities.name: repos_create
capabilities.description: Create a new repository for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: repos_update
capabilities.description: Update a repository's settings including name, description, visibility, and feature toggles.

capabilities.name: repos_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a repository. Requires admin access. This action is irreversible.

capabilities.name: issues_list
capabilities.description: List issues for a repository with optional filtering by state, labels, assignee, and milestone.

capabilities.name: issues_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific issue by number.

capabilities.name: issues_create
capabilities.description: Create a new issue in a repository.

capabilities.name: issues_update
capabilities.description: Update an issue's title, body, state, labels, assignees, or milestone.

capabilities.name: issues_comments_list
capabilities.description: List comments on an issue.

capabilities.name: issues_comments_create
capabilities.description: Create a comment on an issue.

capabilities.name: issues_labels_list
capabilities.description: List labels for a repository.

capabilities.name: pulls_list
capabilities.description: List pull requests for a repository with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: pulls_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific pull request by number.

capabilities.name: pulls_create
capabilities.description: Create a new pull request.

capabilities.name: pulls_update
capabilities.description: Update a pull request's title, body, state, or base branch.

capabilities.name: pulls_merge
capabilities.description: Merge a pull request. The head branch can optionally be deleted after merge.

capabilities.name: pulls_reviews_list
capabilities.description: List reviews on a pull request.

capabilities.name: pulls_reviews_create
capabilities.description: Create a review on a pull request with approval, request changes, or comment.

capabilities.name: actions_workflows_list
capabilities.description: List all workflows in a repository.

capabilities.name: actions_runs_list
capabilities.description: List workflow runs for a repository with optional filtering by workflow, branch, or status.

capabilities.name: actions_workflows_dispatch
capabilities.description: Manually trigger a workflow_dispatch event for a workflow.

capabilities.name: actions_runs_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a workflow run that is in progress or queued.

capabilities.name: actions_runs_rerun
capabilities.description: Re-run a workflow run.

capabilities.name: releases_list
capabilities.description: List releases for a repository.

capabilities.name: releases_create
capabilities.description: Create a new release with release notes and optional assets.

capabilities.name: gists_list
capabilities.description: List gists for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: gists_create
capabilities.description: Create a new gist with one or more files.

capabilities.name: users_get_authenticated
capabilities.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Get a user's public profile by username.

capabilities.name: search_repos
capabilities.description: Search for repositories by keywords, language, stars, and other criteria.

capabilities.name: search_issues
capabilities.description: Search for issues and pull requests across all repositories.

capabilities.name: search_code
capabilities.description: Search for code across all public repositories or within a specific repository.

capabilities.name: orgs_list
capabilities.description: List organizations for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: orgs_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about an organization.

capabilities.name: branches_list
capabilities.description: List branches for a repository.

capabilities.name: commits_list
capabilities.description: List commits for a repository with optional filtering by branch, path, author, and date.

capabilities.name: contents_get
capabilities.description: Get the contents of a file or directory in a repository.

capabilities.name: contents_create_or_update
capabilities.description: Create or update a file in a repository by providing the file content encoded in Base64.
